name: lean-analytics
description: Choose and audit startup metrics using Croll and Yoskovitz''s "Lean Analytics". Use when the user mentions "what metrics should we track", "KPIs", "north star metric", "One Metric That Matters", "OMTM", "vanity metrics", "analytics dashboard", "DAU/MAU", "churn benchmark", "measure product-market fit", "are we tracking the right things", or "which number actually matters". Also trigger when choosing metrics for a startup or feature, auditing a dashboard for vanity metrics, setting metric targets
author: wondelai
